titleStmt.title: SII 15.232: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 232. (A.R. No. 434 of 1926.) DĒVARA HUBBAḶḶI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in front of the Kōḍi Basavaṇṇa temple.
This is dated the 20th regnal year of the king, Kshaya, Jyēshṭha śu. 8, Wednesday corresponding to 1206 A.D., May 17.

It states that the Mahājanas of Huppavaḷḷi had the temple of Mahālakshmī built with the unanimous agreement and endowed land and a shop for worship and offerings to the deity. It also records gifts including oil for burning a lamp before the deity, by the Seṭṭiguttas and other members of the trading community of the four towns of Dāravāḍa, Narēndrapura, Taḍakōḍu and Ammeyabāvi in Halasige Twelve-Thousand. Other gifts by the One-Thousand, the Five-Hundred-and-four and the Seṭṭiguttas of the four towns mentioned above, as well as others are also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © svasti śrī kādaṁba vīra jayakēsidēvava
¨rṣada 20 neya kṣaya saṁvatsarada jēṣṭa suddha 8 budhavāradalu śrīmanumahā
grahāraṁ huppavaḷḷiya 5 vīsakada prabhu siddhapēśa mahā
janaṁgaḷu mahāsabheyāgi neredi¨rddu tammoḷēkamatyavāgi śrīmahā
lakṣmīdēviya pratiṣṭaya māḍisi Ā dēviya nivēdyakkeṁdu
mūvara kaṭṭeya(ṁ) vottinali hāḷigūḍāgi bījabiḍuva
keyi kaṁba 400 Adabaḷiya hakka sahita Aṁgaḍi bīdiyali rā
ja bīdiyiṁ paḍuvalu yiṁnēsaṟalu 5 kayyagalayībbaḍaga 6 kayya
nīḷada Aṁgaḍi 1 Adakke taḷasārige danabaḷa koṭa ha 1 savamaḷega
vi yiṁntivu purassaravāgi kiṟukuḷavaḷiyakenitu sa¨rvvanama
śyavāgi biṭṭaru kāḷave lōkaṇanu dēvakā¨ryyava naḍasuvaru © .
© svasti samadhigatabhuvanavikhyāta paṁcavīrasāsanalabudhānēka
guṇagaṇāḷaṁkritaru satyasaucacārucāritra nayavinaya
vijñāna dha¨rmmapratipāḷanaru . suva¨rṁṇnaguḍḍadhvajaruṁ bhagavatī
labudhavaraprasādarumappa halasige haṁnissāsi
rada dāravāḍa narēṁdrapura taḍakōḍu Ammeyabāvi yiṁtu nā
lakku paṭṭaṇada seṭṭigutaru Ā staḷada nakaraṁgaḷu vaiśya cauriseṭṭi kaṁni
sōsaniseṭṭi muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu mu
vāgi Ā mahājanaṁgaḷa saṁnidhānadalu Ā vūra sananēsara
biṭṭa bhatta saṭṭuga 1 talligaru dēviya naṁdādīvigeṁdu hāḍa
Eṇne sauṭage 1 © sāsi¨rvvaru vayinūṟanā
luvaru nāluku paṭṭaṇada seṭṭigutaru mukhyavāgi Ā ma
hājanaṁgaḷa saṁnidhānadalu dēviya caitrada pa¨rvvakeṁ
du Eleya bojaṁgaru Āḷinalu ha 1 daṁ biṭṭaru . dēviya
caitrada pa¨rvvakeṁdu gātrigaru tamma Ele hēṟiṁge vi 1 bi
ṭṭaru . śāsanavidāvudelliya śāsanavārittarēka salisuve
nānī sāsanamaneṁba pātakanā sakaḷa rauravake gaḷagaḷaniḷiga(gu) .
Digital edition of SII 15.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
